scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check app/
scripts.scheduler:health-check: cd scheduler && uv run python scripts/health_check.py
scripts.scheduler:greeks: cd scheduler && uv run python scripts/calculate_greeks.py
scripts.scheduler:market-data: cd scheduler && uv run python scripts/fetch_market_data.py
scripts.scheduler:picks: cd scheduler && uv run python scripts/generate_picks.py
